summary: Completed frontend testing for PortfolioHealth Advisor Deep Navy Corporate theme redesign. All 10 features tested and verified working correctly. The app has a professional McKinsey/Deloitte consulting tool appearance with #0A1628 background, gold #C9A84C accents, and proper glass effects.
passed_tests: Login with admin@ppdt.com / Admin123! - works correctly, redirects to dashboard
Landing page - corporate navy theme (#0A1628 background), gold logo visible, gold 'Get Started' button
Dashboard - stat cards visible (Total Assessments, Completed, Quick Screenings, Companies), radar chart loads, sidebar navigation works
Companies page - can view companies, action menu has dark background (rgba(13, 17, 23, 0.95)), no text overlap
Assessments page - Report column visible, Download PDF button appears for completed assessments
Report page - Corporate theme, overall score visible (1.80), PPDT chart renders, score breakdown panel works, all 9 sections present
Quick Assessment flow - company info form works, questions flow works with progress indicator
Dropdown menus - dark background styling throughout the app
HashRouter page reload - /#/companies reloads correctly without 404 error
Admin panel - accessible, shows data with Report column and PDF download button for completed assessments

theme_verification.glass_effects: Working - glass-surface, glass-card, glass-input classes applied
theme_verification.dropdown_bg: Dark background on all select/option elements

critical_code_review_comments: Theme implementation is consistent across all pages
Color palette correctly applied: gold #C9A84C, blue #60A5FA, green #34D399, red #EF4444, purple #A78BFA
Glass morphism effects working correctly with backdrop-filter
HashRouter implementation working - no 404 on page reload
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: None required - existing data used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All theme redesign features verified working. The app has a professional corporate appearance with Deep Navy (#0A1628) background, gold (#C9A84C) accents, and proper glass effects. Login, dashboard, companies, assessments, report, quick assessment, and admin panel all working correctly. HashRouter page reload works without 404. Dropdown menus have dark backgrounds throughout.

features_verified.landing_page: Working - corporate navy theme, gold logo, gold Get Started button
features_verified.dashboard: Working - stat cards, radar chart, sidebar navigation
features_verified.companies_page: Working - action menu with dark background
features_verified.assessments_page: Working - Report column with PDF download button
features_verified.report_page: Working - all 9 sections, PPDT chart, score breakdown
features_verified.quick_assessment: Working - company info form, questions flow
features_verified.admin_panel: Working - data visible, Report column present
